impact.hero_subtitle: Let there be no difficult business in the world.
impact.social_description: Empowering edge innovators. Breaking traditional filters and empowering solo founders with out-of-the-box infrastructure.
impact.governance_description: Algorithmic governance built on Proof of Work and real business results, replacing opaque bureaucracy.
impact.environment_description: Driving cloud footprint reduction via extreme SaaS integration and resource efficiency.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage your password, multi-factor authentication, and active sessions.
security.managedByProvider: Security settings are managed by your authentication provider.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.description: Use a strong password you don't reuse on other sites.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Add a second verification step using an authenticator app.
twoFactor.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code below.
twoFactor.backupCodesDescription: Save these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose access to your authenticator.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Devices and browsers currently signed in to your account.
sessions.revokeAll: Sign out of all other devices

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently remove your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

errors.userNotFound: No account found with that email.
errors.userAlreadyExists: An account with that email already exists.
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 8 characters with mixed case and numbers.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.samePassword: New password must be different from your current password.
errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email address first.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.invalidVerificationCode: Verification code is incorrect or expired.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.rateLimited: You're doing that too often. Slow down.
errors.providerNotSupported: This action is managed by your authentication provider.
errors.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
